headline: Neil
body: Neil is linked with a managerial move to Ipswich.
text:
Ipswich Town set to appoint Gary O'Neil as their new head coach following the departure of Kieran McKenna.

An agreement is in place with Strasbourg. Talks at an advanced stage on personal terms.🚜

🤝 @alex_crook
draft_caption:

RUMOUR | Neil

Neil is linked with a managerial move to Ipswich.
